name: part_008
file: tmp_【 3DLIVE 】#アキロゼ生誕祭2026 ーLife is GAMEー【ホロライブ⧸アキ・ローゼンタール】 [_tBlI-l8WLk]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_008.webm

scenes.description: Performance of 'BANG!!!' by Aki Rosenthal and guests.
Board game segment where Aki navigates a virtual board.
Solo performance of 'Bad Apple!!' by Aki Rosenthal.

subtitles.original: ...返しくらえ
subtitles.english: ...Take that in return!

subtitles.original: パンチライン　聴かせてあげる　Ah
subtitles.english: I'll let you hear the punchline, Ah

subtitles.original: やってから考えな Now
subtitles.english: Think about it after you do it, Now

subtitles.original: 私がついてるから Ah
subtitles.english: Because I'm with you, Ah

subtitles.original: Everybody say I want to be free
subtitles.english: Everybody say I want to be free

subtitles.original: 喰らえこのビート　空中感
subtitles.english: Take this beat, the feeling of floating

subtitles.original: 全部黙らす Show!
subtitles.english: A show that silences everything!

subtitles.original: 目覚ませ起きてよ
subtitles.english: Wake up, get up

subtitles.original: Wake up, Wake up　いっそまた
subtitles.english: Wake up, Wake up, let's just...

subtitles.original: ねぇ　いっそまた
subtitles.english: Hey, let's just...

subtitles.original: 生まれたその時から選んできたんだ
subtitles.english: I've been choosing it since the moment I was born

subtitles.original: 思い出せ　私は私だ
subtitles.english: Remember, I am who I am

subtitles.original: 不可能なことなど　何ひとつもない　嘘じゃないぞ
subtitles.english: There is nothing impossible, and that's no lie

subtitles.original: 生まれたその時から選んできたんだ
subtitles.english: You've been choosing it since the moment you were born

subtitles.original: 思い出せ　あなたはあなただ
subtitles.english: Remember, you are who you are

subtitles.original: 不可能なことなど　何ひとつもない　嘘じゃないなりたい自分に
subtitles.english: There is nothing impossible, and that's no lie, to the person you want to be

subtitles.original: Against, Keep, Try, To see, I don't care, Foot of the path
subtitles.english: Against, Keep, Try, To see, I don't care, Foot of the path

subtitles.original: Against, Keep, Try, To see, I don't care, Foot of the path
subtitles.english: Against, Keep, Try, To see, I don't care, Foot of the path

subtitles.original: Bad Apple!!
subtitles.english: Bad Apple!!

subtitles.original: 作詞：Haruka 作曲：ZUN
subtitles.english: Lyrics: Haruka Composition: ZUN

subtitles.original: 流れてく時の中ででも　気だるさが
subtitles.english: Even in the midst of flowing time, listlessness...

subtitles.original: ほらグルグル回って　私から離れる
subtitles.english: See, it spins around and moves away from me

subtitles.original: 心も見えないわ　そう知らない
subtitles.english: I can't even see my heart, I don't know it

subtitles.original: 自分から動くこともなく　時の隙間に
subtitles.english: Without moving of my own accord, into the gaps of time...

subtitles.original: 流され続けて知らないわ　周りのことなど
subtitles.english: Being washed away continuously, I don't know anything about my surroundings

subtitles.original: 私は私それだけ
subtitles.english: I am me, and that's all

subtitles.original: 夢見てる？なにも見てない？
subtitles.english: Am I dreaming? Am I seeing nothing?

subtitles.original: 語るも無駄な自分の言葉
subtitles.english: It's useless to speak my own words

subtitles.original: 悲しむなんて疲れるだけよ
subtitles.english: Feeling sad just wears me out

subtitles.original: 何も感じず過ごせばいいの
subtitles.english: It's better to just live without feeling anything

subtitles.original: 戸惑う言葉与えられても
subtitles.english: Even if I'm given words that confuse me...

subtitles.original: 自分の心　ただ上の空
subtitles.english: My heart is just somewhere else

subtitles.original: もし私から動くのならば　すべて変えるのなら黒にする
subtitles.english: If I were to move on my own, if I were to change everything, I'd make it black

subtitles.original: こんな自分に未来はあるの？
subtitles.english: Is there a future for someone like me?

subtitles.original: こんな世界に私はいるの？
subtitles.english: Do I exist in a world like this?

subtitles.original: 今切ないの？今悲しいの？
subtitles.english: Am I in pain now? Am I sad now?

subtitles.original: 自分のこともわからないまま
subtitles.english: Without even knowing myself...

subtitles.original: 歩むことさえ疲れるだけよ
subtitles.english: Even just walking is exhausting

subtitles.original: 人のことなど知りもしないわ
subtitles.english: I don't know anything about others

subtitles.original: こんな私も変われるのなら　もし変われるのなら白になる
subtitles.english: If even I could change, if I could change, I'd become white

subtitles.original: 流れてく時の中ででも　気だるさが
subtitles.english: Even in the midst of flowing time, listlessness...

subtitles.original: ほらグルグル回って　私から離れる
subtitles.english: See, it spins around and moves away from me

subtitles.original: 心も見えないわ　そう知らない
subtitles.english: I can't even see my heart, I don't know it

subtitles.original: 自分から動くこともなく
subtitles.english: Without moving of my own accord...

subtitles.original: 時の隙間に流され続けて知らないわ
subtitles.english: Being washed away continuously into the gaps of time, I don't know...

subtitles.original: 周りのことなど　私は私それだけ
subtitles.english: anything about my surroundings, I am me and that's all

subtitles.original: 夢見てる？なにも見てない？
subtitles.english: Am I dreaming? Am I seeing nothing?

subtitles.original: 語るも無駄な自分の言葉
subtitles.english: It's useless to speak my own words
